accurate.why: All claims are accurate and supported by the bill text; the description of Executive Order 10264 and its effect is correct.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the description of the prior restriction (requiring Congressional action) is accurate.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose: repealing the restriction on amendments to the Constitution of American Samoa.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly identifies the repeal of Section 12 of Public Law 98-213 (48 U.S.C. 1662a).

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the continuing subject to Congress's Territorial Clause authority.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the January 4, 2025 effective date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the single operative provision: repeal of Section 12 of P.L. 98-213.

concise.why: Appropriately detailed for a bill that has a complex long title and single operative provision.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies Public Law 98-213, 48 U.S.C. 1662a, and Executive Order 10264.

correct_figures.why: Executive Order date (June 29, 1951) and enactment date (January 4, 2025) are both correct.
